# Ilzam — AI-Native Software Engineer & Fractional CTO

> I help early-stage founders build and ship their product — acting as fractional CTO with AI-assisted development. Based in Indonesia, working globally.

## About

Ilzam is an AI-native software engineer and fractional CTO. He has shipped 15+ MVPs, led platform rebuilds for 5,000+ user systems, and currently works embedded in a San Francisco AI company — remotely from East Java, Indonesia. He builds with Go, React, TypeScript, .NET, and PostgreSQL. He thinks in systems, not tickets.

## Services

### Fractional CTO
Senior technical judgment, without the full-time salary. For founders who need someone to own the technical side — architecture decisions, stack choices, vendor evaluation, team hiring, sprint planning — without committing to a $150k/year hire.

### MVP Development
From whiteboard to deployed. In weeks, not months. AI-assisted development that moves at 2-3x the speed of a traditional agency while writing production-quality code. Most MVPs ship in 6-10 weeks.

### Technical Advisory
A one-time or recurring session for founders who need a second opinion — on a vendor proposal, an agency quote, a build vs buy decision, or a technology choice.

## Tech Stack

- Languages: Go, TypeScript, JavaScript, PHP, C#, Dart
- Frontend: React, .NET, Flutter, Tailwind CSS, Astro
- Backend: Go Fiber, Node.js, Express, Laravel, .NET
- Data & Infra: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS
- Architecture: Event-driven, microservices, REST APIs, RAG pipelines, hybrid search

## Proof Points

- 15+ MVPs shipped
- Reduced infrastructure costs by 80% for a healthcare network
- Rebuilt a KOL platform from 85% to 99% uptime, serving 5,000+ users
- Introduced methodology that cut requirement analysis time by 75%
- Guided 60+ vocational teachers through technical upskilling
- Currently embedded in a San Francisco AI company as an AI-native software engineer

## Things I've Shipped

- Chef Booking Marketplace (Scandinavia) — Two-sided marketplace, 10 weeks, one engineer. Go, React, PostgreSQL, Stripe Connect, Redis.
- AI Knowledge Pipeline (San Francisco, US) — RAG that actually retrieves the right thing. Go, PostgreSQL, pgvector, BM25, Markdown AST.
- KOL Management Platform Rebuild (Jakarta, Indonesia) — 85% to 99% uptime. 5,000+ users. Full-stack rebuild, team lead.
- Government Vocational Dashboard (Indonesia) — Centralizing education data for a national directorate. REST API, recommender system, data dashboard.
